languages.text:
При получении урона более {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} Отросток скрывается под землю. В начале нового раунда Отросток выползает/появляется в другом месте.
Не срабатывает если Отросток подожжен (весит какое то из Бернингов)

traits.locale_text:
При получении урона более {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} Отросток скрывается под землю. В начале нового раунда Отросток выползает/появляется в другом месте.
Не срабатывает если Отросток подожжен (весит какое то из Бернингов)

languages.text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.
languages.original_text:
При получении урона более {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} Отросток скрывается под землю. В начале нового раунда Отросток выползает/появляется в другом месте.
Не срабатывает если Отросток подожжен (весит какое то из Бернингов)

traits.locale_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one hit, the Drover's tentacle hides underground. At the start of the next round, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the Drover's tentacle is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or the damage dealt has fire type.

When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the Drover's tentacle burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the Drover's tentacle is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

languages.text: При получении более {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} урона за одно {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадание{/g} булава зарывается под землю. В начале следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} она появляется в другой области. Эта способность не срабатывает, если булава {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горит{/g} или получает {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}огненный урон{/g}.
languages.original_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: При получении более {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} урона за одно {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадание{/g} булава зарывается под землю. В начале следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} она появляется в другой области. Эта способность не срабатывает, если булава {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горит{/g} или получает {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}огненный урон{/g}.

При получении более {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} урона за одно {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадание{/g} булава зарывается под землю. В начале следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g} она появляется в другой области. Эта способность не срабатывает, если булава {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горит{/g} или получает {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}огненный урон{/g}.

languages.text: Après avoir subi plus de {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} points de dégâts d'un seul {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}coup{/g}, la masse s'enfouit dans le sol avant de ressurgir à un autre endroit au début du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Cette capacité ne se déclenche pas si la masse subit {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} ou des {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}dégâts de feu{/g}.
languages.original_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Après avoir subi plus de {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} points de dégâts d'un seul {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}coup{/g}, la masse s'enfouit dans le sol avant de ressurgir à un autre endroit au début du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Cette capacité ne se déclenche pas si la masse subit {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} ou des {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}dégâts de feu{/g}.

languages.text: Gürz, bir {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vuruşta{/g} {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} hasardan fazla verdiğinde yer altına gömülür. Bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} başında başka bir alanda ortaya çıkar. Gürz {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanıyorsa{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}ateş hasarı{/g} almışsa bu kabiliyet tetiklenmez.
languages.original_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Gürz, bir {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vuruşta{/g} {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} hasardan fazla verdiğinde yer altına gömülür. Bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raundun{/g} başında başka bir alanda ortaya çıkar. Gürz {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanıyorsa{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}ateş hasarı{/g} almışsa bu kabiliyet tetiklenmez.

languages.text: 单次{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}承受的伤害超过{uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468}点时，藤锤会钻入地下。下一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}开始时，它会出现在另一个区域。如果藤锤处于{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}状态，或受到了{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火焰伤害{/g}，则此能力不会触发。
languages.original_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 单次{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}承受的伤害超过{uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468}点时，藤锤会钻入地下。下一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}开始时，它会出现在另一个区域。如果藤锤处于{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}状态，或受到了{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火焰伤害{/g}，则此能力不会触发。

languages.text: Si recibe más de {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} de daño en un solo {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g}, la maza se oculta bajo tierra. Al comienzo del próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, emerge en otra zona distinta. Esta capacidad no se activa si la maza sufre {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} o si se le inflige {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}daño por fuego{/g}.
languages.original_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Si recibe más de {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} de daño en un solo {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g}, la maza se oculta bajo tierra. Al comienzo del próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, emerge en otra zona distinta. Esta capacidad no se activa si la maza sufre {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} o si se le inflige {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}daño por fuego{/g}.

languages.text: Verursacht der Treiber mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g} mehr als {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} Schaden, gräbt sich die Blüte in den Boden. Zu Beginn der nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} taucht sie an einer anderen Stelle wieder auf. Diese Fähigkeit wird nicht ausgelöst, wenn die Blüte des Treibers {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}brennt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}Feuerschaden{/g} erleidet.
languages.original_text: When dealt more than {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} damage in one {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, the mace burrows underground. At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Verursacht der Treiber mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g} mehr als {uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468} Schaden, gräbt sich die Blüte in den Boden. Zu Beginn der nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} taucht sie an einer anderen Stelle wieder auf. Diese Fähigkeit wird nicht ausgelöst, wenn die Blüte des Treibers {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}brennt{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}Feuerschaden{/g} erleidet.

languages.text: 1回の{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}攻撃{/g}で{uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468}以上のダメージを受けた場合、マウイスは地下に潜り、次の{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の開始時に別のエリアに現れます。マウイスが{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃えている{/g}時や{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火ダメージ{/g}を受けた時はこの能力は発動しません。

At the start of the next {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, it emerges in another area. This ability is not triggered if the mace is {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} or if it is dealt {g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}fire damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 1回の{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}攻撃{/g}で{uip|Damage|7f65d22441904fe59f820b2a44287468}以上のダメージを受けた場合、マウイスは地下に潜り、次の{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の開始時に別のエリアに現れます。マウイスが{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃えている{/g}時や{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火ダメージ{/g}を受けた時はこの能力は発動しません。
